assessments.resumeText:
NAIVEDYA SINGH
Full-Stack Developer  ·  AI Builder  ·  SaaS Creator
B.Tech CSE @ VIT Bhopal  |  Graduating June 2029	naivedyasingh9043@gmail.com
Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, India
linkedin.com/in/naivedya-singh-5005a4366
 Hackathon Winner

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY


Driven Computer Science undergraduate at VIT Bhopal with a proven track record of building production-ready AI and SaaS platforms. Specialises in crafting full-stack applications that integrate Large Language Models, RAG pipelines, and predictive ML to solve real-world problems across healthcare, education, and research domains. Hackathon 2nd Prize winner and open-source contributor with a bias for shipping impactful software.

EDUCATION


B.Tech – Computer Science & Engineering  |  Vellore Institute of Technology, Bhopal	July 2025 – June 2029
▸	GPA: On track | Hackathon 2nd Prize winner | Active open-source contributor
▸	Relevant coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Machine Learning, Web Technologies, Software Engineering

PROJECTS


Aegis — Hospital Claim Denial Prevention System	Apr 2026 – Present
AI-powered revenue intelligence SaaS reducing insurance claim rejections for mid-sized hospitals and specialty clinics across India.
▸	Built a risk scoring engine combining rule-based validation with ML pattern detection to predict claim denial likelihood before submission
▸	Analysed ICD-10 codes, CPT procedures, insurer-specific rules, and billing amounts to surface top denial causes with actionable remediation steps
▸	Engineered a 'revenue at risk' calculator that quantifies potential losses in real time, demonstrating direct ROI to billing teams
▸	Generated audit-ready PDF reports covering risk flags, corrective actions, and compliance checks for regulatory readiness
Tech: Python · Scikit-learn · SaaS · PDF generation · Rule-based AI

STEMverse — AI Platform for Women in STEM	Nov 2025
Full-stack, mobile-first Progressive Web App empowering women in STEM through personalised AI mentorship, gamified learning, and curated opportunities.
▸	Integrated Google Gemini API with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for context-aware career guidance, scholarship insights, and role-model stories
▸	Designed STEMQuest gamification layer (XP, quests, achievement badges) across 3 career tracks — Software Dev, Data Science, AI
▸	Built AI Resume Analyzer using Gemini's JSON mode: delivers resume score, identified strengths, and prioritised improvement suggestions
▸	Delivered full community forum (tagged posts, threaded replies, upvoting) and curated Opportunities Hub with advanced search and bookmarking
Tech: React · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · Google Gemini API · RAG · PWA · Render

BioQuest — Research Intelligence Platform	Jan 2026 – Feb 2026
SaaS platform helping students and scholars validate research ideas, identify novelty gaps, and connect with PhD-level experts.
▸	Implemented trend analysis engine to scan ongoing research and flag whether an idea remains novel before significant time is invested
▸	Built expert-matching system connecting researchers with domain-specific PhD mentors for methodology refinement and publication targeting
Tech: Python · SaaS · Web Design · Software Development

Smart Expense & Profit Analyzer	Mar 2026
ML-powered financial tracking tool for students and micro-businesses, combining expense categorisation with predictive analytics.
▸	Trained a Scikit-learn regression model on historical spending data to forecast future expense trends with anomaly detection for unusual patterns
▸	Delivered profit calculation module for micro-business transactions with an aggregated financial summary dashboard
Tech: Python · Scikit-learn · Machine Learning · Regression · Anomaly Detection

SRO — Smart Schedule Planner	Nov 2025
▸	Built an intelligent task scheduling system with multiple optimisation algorithms, visual monthly calendar, and habit tracking
▸	Architected Python backend scheduling engine exposed via RESTful API to a Vanilla JS frontend with schedule export functionality
Tech: Python · Vanilla JavaScript · RESTful API · Backend Engineering

TECHNICAL SKILLS


Languages & Frameworks
Python	JavaScript	TypeScript	React

AI / ML
Gemini API	RAG Pipelines	Scikit-learn	Prompt Engineering

Tools & Platforms
Tailwind CSS	RESTful APIs	Git / GitHub	Render / PWA

Domain Expertise
SaaS Development	Full-Stack Dev	Healthcare Tech	EdTech

CERTIFICATIONS & ACHIEVEMENTS


Hackathon – 2nd Prize  |  Competitive Hackathon	2025
▸	Secured 2nd place — designed and shipped a functional product under time-constrained competitive conditions

Discover the Art of Prompting  |  Google	2025
▸	Certified in advanced prompt engineering techniques for large language model applications

#100DaysOfCode  |  Open-Source Community	2025
▸	Completed 100-day public coding challenge — consistent daily contributions across Python, web development, and AI projects
Intern at pre sales at decimal 
Intern as backend engineer at flyrank ai

Open to internships · freelance collaborations · open-source projects
